partial_progress.details: Restructured Case B1 with proper case splits on CanonicalR M' V. All remaining sorries (12 in DensityFrameCondition, 3 in CantorApplication) share identical structure: witnesses land at reflexive attractor instead of strictly between endpoints. Pattern C (fuel-based iteration) confirmed as only solution path.

completion_data.completion_summary: Iteration 2: Restructured Case B1 proof paths with explicit case splits. All 15 sorries now have uniform structure requiring Pattern C iteration. Key insight: reflexive MCS acts as attractor for forward witnesses.

sorry_analysis.change: +4 (due to explicit case splits revealing hidden sub-cases)
